message:
fix: head/tail -N short form, ls on files, printf format strings

- head -2 / tail -5 short form now works (not just -n N)
- ls file.txt shows the file itself instead of empty directory listing
- printf handles %s, %d, %%, \n, \t format strings
- Remove unused args column from processes schema

files.patch:
@@ -78,7 +78,6 @@ export class Workspace extends DurableObject<Env> {
       CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS processes (
         pid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
         command TEXT NOT NULL,
-        args TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
         status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'running',
         exit_code INTEGER,
         stdout TEXT,
